title: Monitor (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Monitor''''' could refer to several things:

==Ships==
*[[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]
*[[Monitor (carrier)]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] training carrier
*[[Monitor III]]
*[[YQ-400 Monitor droid patrol ship]]

==Other==
*[[Chief Ideological Monitor]], a [[CompForce/Legends|CompForce]] rank
*[[Computer monitor/Legends|Computer monitor]]
*[[Life monitor/Legends|Life monitor]], a medical device
*[[The Life Monitor]], a news service
*[[Monitor Control]], the security center of [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]]
{{Disambig}}
